extensionDescription.message: Adds a recording button to Teams Web to capture audio locally and attach it as a WAV file.

browserUnsupportedMicrophoneCapture.message: This browser does not support microphone capture on this page.

browserReportedRecordingError.message: The browser reported an error during recording.

convertToWavFailed.message: Could not convert the audio to WAV.

composerNotFound.message: Could not find the active Teams composer.

teamsDidNotConfirmAttachment.message: Teams did not confirm the audio attachment.

teamsCouldNotOpenFilePicker.message: Could not open the Teams file picker.

teamsFilePickerRejectedAudio.message: The Teams file picker rejected the audio file.

teamsDidNotConfirmWavUpload.message: Teams did not confirm the WAV upload in the composer.

sendOrRemovePendingAttachment.message: Send or remove the current attachment before recording another audio message.

popupDescription.message: Keep the system default for most cases, or expand the microphone section when you need a specific input.

popupNoiseSuppressionDescription.message: Uses the browser's native audio processing during recording.

popupStatusLoading.message: Loading microphones from the active Teams tab...

popupStatusOpenTeams.message: Open Teams Web in an active tab to load the microphone list.

popupStatusLabelsHidden.message: Some microphone names may stay generic until Teams has microphone permission.

popupStatusSelectedMissing.message: The saved microphone is no longer available. Reverting to system default.

popupStatusLoadFailed.message: Could not load microphones from Teams Web.

popupFooter.message: A custom DSP algorithm is not used here; this toggle only enables or disables the browser's built-in suppression.

unexpectedVoiceMessageError.message: Unexpected failure while processing the voice message.
